full_text:
Sima Wang (Zichu) 司馬望 (子初)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Wang (司馬望), styledZichu (子初). Fought Shu with Deng Ai, ambushed and killed Xiahou Ba. Sima Wang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Sima Wang lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
